title: Modern Warp Menu
description: A prettier warp menu for Hypixel SkyBlock, Ported to modern minecraft.
body:
# Modern Warp Menu

This project is an Unofficial modern minecraft port of [Fancy Warp Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/fancy-warp-menu)!

Supported version: 1.21.11, 26.1.2

---

## Required mods

- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)
- [YetAnotherConfigLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/yacl)

## Difference's from Original

- Custom Layout format
  - This means can't be use Fancy warp menu resource packs 
  - Diff previews are [here](https://github.com/Yukkuritaku/ModernWarpMenu/blob/modern-main/docs/fwm_to_mwm_migration_guide.md)
    - (Resource pack template is currently not created)

## Screenshots

![Warp Menu Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3GNyRk4I/images/c1965b2dae3f23a94a15ae8d07f29d6c7522ffc5_350.webp)

![Settings](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/3GNyRk4I/images/19b68106251df72eadd7d562b06cd9fc56158c87_350.webp)
